title: Plan Handoff
description: Typed contract between code-planner and code-implementer. code-planner writes this; human sets approved:true; code-implementer gates on approved==true.

task_id.description: Bead ID of the intent bead anchoring this task

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this handoff was written

summary.description: One-sentence description of what is being implemented

files_in_scope.description: Paths of files the implementer is permitted to create or modify

files_not_in_scope.description: Paths explicitly excluded from this implementation

constraints.description: Hard constraints the implementer must not violate

decisions.description: Architectural decisions made during planning, with rationale

changes.description: Ordered list of file-level changes the implementer must execute

completed.description: Set to true by implementer when this change is done

commands.description: Commands to run to verify the implementation (e.g. pytest tests/ -v)

blocked_if.description: Conditions under which implementation must not be marked complete (e.g. any test fails)

approved.description: Set to false by code-planner. Human sets to true at CP-1 (plan approval). code-implementer must refuse to start until this is true.
